findings.evidence: `rg` shows the general lemma at `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:167` and this proof is just `simpa using (prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity ... (F.prod G))` at lines 181-183.
findings.fix: Drop this parallel lemma unless there is a demonstrated simp-normal-form need that cannot be served by `prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` plus existing `LinearMap.prod` projection simp lemmas.
findings.issue: `prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod` is only the paired-map specialization of the immediately preceding general projection split.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:114:lemma stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff` and `Prod.lean:236:lemma prod_tames`; the new proof starts by `rw [(ω₁.prod ω₂).stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff (prod_tames h₁ h₂)]` at line 193.
findings.fix: Use `(ω₁.prod ω₂).stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff (prod_tames h₁ h₂)` and generic product-map extensionality/projection simp locally instead of adding a new API lemma.
findings.issue: `prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff` duplicates product nondegeneracy after rewriting through the existing general zero-energy theorem.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits show the existing zero-energy theorem at `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:114` and product tameness at `Prod.lean:236`; this proof is just `simpa using (prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_zero_iff ... (F := F.prod G))` at lines 210-213.
findings.fix: Remove it and rewrite with the general zero-energy theorem plus `prod_tames`, or with the coordinate projection form only if that lemma remains.
findings.issue: `prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod_eq_zero_iff` is the same zero-energy duplication specialized further to `F.prod G`.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits: Mathlib has `DifferentiableAt.fderiv_prodMk` at `Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv/Prod.lean:103`; the new proof is exactly `rw [hg.fderiv_prodMk hh]` then `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod` at lines 345-348.
findings.fix: Use `DifferentiableAt.fderiv_prodMk` followed by `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod` at call sites instead of exporting this wrapper.
findings.issue: `fderiv_prodMk_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` adds derivative-specific API with no derivative-specific content beyond Mathlib's product derivative rule and the linear product split.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits: Mathlib has `DifferentiableWithinAt.fderivWithin_prodMk` at `Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv/Prod.lean:108`; the new proof is exactly `rw [hg.fderivWithin_prodMk hh hs]` then `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod` at lines 457-460.
findings.fix: Use `DifferentiableWithinAt.fderivWithin_prodMk` followed by `SymplecticForm.prod_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_prod` locally instead of adding another exported lemma.
findings.issue: `fderivWithin_prodMk_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity` duplicates the same wrapper pattern for within-set derivatives.

summary: The product energy split itself appears new, but the PR adds several corollaries that are just small rewrites of existing product, zero-energy, and derivative-product APIs.
